subjects.subject: Language
subjects.title: Long Vowel Sounds
subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Reading strand: long vowels say their name, as in cake, bee, kite, boat, cube. The silent E rule often signals a long vowel.

quiz.q: Which word has a long A sound?

subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Number strand: students count, read, write, and represent whole numbers to 50, and describe their positions on a number line.

quiz.q: What number comes after 39?

subjects.title: Seasonal Changes: Fall
subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Earth and Space Systems strand: in fall, days shorten, leaves change colour and drop, and animals prepare for winter.

quiz.q: In fall, leaves on deciduous trees ___.

subjects.subject: SocialStudies
subjects.title: My School Community
subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Social Studies strand: students identify school community members and their roles, and describe how everyone contributes.

options: To keep everyone safe and learning

subjects.subject: Language

subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Matter and Materials strand: students identify the three states of matter by exploring everyday examples of solids, liquids, and gases.

quiz.q: Which state of matter has a definite shape?

subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Social Studies strand B: students use directional language and simple maps to describe locations in familiar places.

quiz.q: A map is a ___.
options: Drawing of a real place from above

subjects.subject: Language
subjects.title: Sight Words
subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Reading strand: students recognize high-frequency Dolch sight words automatically, supporting reading fluency. Examples: the, and, a, to, said, is, you, in, was.

subjects.subject: Science
subjects.title: Needs of Living Things
subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Life Systems strand: all living things need air, water, food, and shelter. Plants also need sunlight to make food through photosynthesis.

quiz.q: Which is NOT a basic need of living things?

options: Be protected from weather and predators

subjects.subject: SocialStudies
subjects.title: Community Workers
subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Social Studies strand B: students identify community workers and explain how their work benefits everyone in the community.

options: Carry passengers from place to place

quiz.q: Where does a chef work?

options: Each job meets a different need

quiz.q: Who repairs broken water pipes?

subjects.subject: Language

quiz.q: Which word belongs to the -AT family?

subjects.subject: Math
subjects.title: Place Value: Tens and Ones

quiz.q: In the number 23, the digit 2 means ___.

subjects.subject: Science
subjects.title: Seasonal Changes: Winter
subjects.summary: Ontario Grade 1 Earth and Space Systems strand: in winter, temperatures drop, many trees are bare, some animals hibernate, and people wear warm clothing.

options: To keep everyone safe and learning

options: Being treated fairly and kept safe

subjects.subject: Language

quiz.q: Every sentence must start with a ___.

Something people make in a factory
